play.title: [he-IL] Play on KiX
play.meta.description: [he-IL] Browse and play branded mini-games. Earn rewards from your favourite cafes and merchants.
play.hero.title: [he-IL] Pick a game. Play. Win rewards.
play.hero.sub: [he-IL] All games are free. Earn energy by visiting merchants, then spend it on the games you love.
play.energy.label: [he-IL] Energy
play.streak.title: [he-IL] Daily streak
play.streak.days: [he-IL] {count, plural, =0 {No streak yet} one {1 day} other {# days}}
play.streak.next_milestone: [he-IL] {count, plural, one {1 day to next milestone} other {# days to next milestone}}
play.streak.longest: [he-IL] Longest: {count, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}
play.streak.signin_prompt: [he-IL] Sign in to track your streak.
play.filters.title: [he-IL] Filters
play.filters.results: [he-IL] {count, plural, =0 {No games match} one {1 game} other {# games}}
play.card.plays_today: [he-IL] {count, plural, =0 {No plays yet today} one {1 play today} other {# plays today}}
play.card.plays_week: [he-IL] {count, plural, =0 {No plays this week} one {1 play this week} other {# plays this week}}
play.leaderboard.empty: [he-IL] No scores yet today. Be the first to play.
play.htp.title: [he-IL] How to play
play.htp.latte_art.objective: [he-IL] Pour milk into the espresso at the perfect moment to create latte art.
play.htp.latte_art.controls: [he-IL] Watch the indicator. Tap or press Space when it lines up with the green sweet spot.
play.htp.latte_art.scoring: [he-IL] Five rounds. The closer to the sweet spot centre, the higher the round score.
play.htp.bean_match.objective: [he-IL] Find all matching pairs of cards before time runs out.
play.htp.bean_match.controls: [he-IL] Click or tap a card to flip it. Use arrow keys and Enter for keyboard play.
play.htp.bean_match.scoring: [he-IL] Each pair earns 1,000 points plus time and efficiency bonuses.
play.htp.default.objective: [he-IL] Score as many points as possible before the game ends.
play.htp.default.controls: [he-IL] Use on-screen controls or your keyboard. Arrow keys move, Enter selects.
play.htp.default.scoring: [he-IL] Higher accuracy and faster completion earn more points.
play.rewards.title: [he-IL] My rewards
play.rewards.empty: [he-IL] No rewards yet. Play to win vouchers.
play.rewards.redeem_confirm_msg: [he-IL] Confirm you have already used "{code}" at the merchant. This cannot be undone.
play.toast.qr_cooldown: [he-IL] Come back later for more energy.
play.toast.qr_expired: [he-IL] QR expired. Ask staff for a fresh code.
play.error.no_brand.title: [he-IL] No brand specified
play.error.no_brand.msg: [he-IL] Access this page through a merchant QR code or branded link.
play.error.load.title: [he-IL] Could not load
play.error.load.msg: [he-IL] Please refresh the page or try again later.
